name: pagination
title: BTPagination
description: Data pagination molecule. Three variants: 'number' (first/prev/pages/next/ last), 'display' (rows-per-page selector + prev/next), and 'step' (Step N of M + Prev/Next).

files.content:
export { default as BTPagination } from './BTPagination.vue';
export type { BTPaginationProps, BTPaginationVariant } from './BTPagination.types';
